headline: Ciena Soars 182% in 6 Months: Should Investors Buy the Stock Now?
summary: CIEN has surged 178% on booming AI and cloud demand, with strong growth drivers and rising estimates signaling potential for further upside.

headline: Anthropic Releases Claude 4.7, Introducing Mythos-Inspired Cybersecurity Protections
summary: Anthropic has released Claude Opus 4.7, which will test new cyber capabilities "not as advanced" as those of Mythos Preview.

headline: Customer Demand for Continuous Packet Capture Drives Upsurge in Endace Partner Program
summary: AUCKLAND, New Zealand & AUSTIN, Texas, April 16, 2026--Packet capture authority, Endace, has announced a raft of new partners and updated integrations as part of its Fusion Partner Program, including Cisco XDR, Splunk SIEM, Splunk SOAR, Vectra AI, Microsoft Sentinel, Google SecOps, Exabeam LogRhythm, Palo Alto Networks XSOAR, Sumo Logic, and Fortinet FortiNDR.

headline: TSMC and ASML post-earnings stock moves could be a sign of what's to come from chip companies
summary: Two of the biggest chipmakers, TSMC and ASML, failed to catch major tailwinds from strong earnings. It could be a bellwether for the chip industry as a whole.

headline: Registration for Keynotes Now Open! Largest-ever COMPUTEX Forum with All-Access Pass; Early Bird Discount Countdown Starts
summary: COMPUTEX 2026, the world's leading exhibition for AI and startups, will be held from June 2 to 5 at the Taipei Nangang Exhibition Center (Halls 1 & 2) and Taipei World Trade Center (Hall 1). Today, the organizer TAITRA announced that the official registration for the highly anticipated COMPUTEX Keynotes is now live. headline: Cisco Astrix Talks Highlight AI Agent Security Push For Investors
summary: Cisco Systems (NasdaqGS:CSCO) is reportedly in advanced talks to acquire cybersecurity startup Astrix Security. Astrix Security focuses on monitoring and securing AI agents and their connections to enterprise systems. The potential deal would add to Cisco's push into AI focused security and subscription based software. This news relates to Cisco's broader effort to grow its role in cybersecurity alongside its networking business. Cisco has long been known for its networking hardware, but in...
